regulations.title: OSHA 1994 (Akta 514)
regulations.full_title: Occupational Safety and Health Act 1994 — The foundational OSH law for all workplaces

questions.question: Do you have a written Safety and Health Policy?
questions.detail: Employers with 5+ workers must have a written OSH policy communicated to all employees.
action_steps: Draft a written OSH policy statement signed by top management
Display the policy prominently in the workplace
Communicate it to all employees during induction
Review and update the policy annually

questions.question: Do you conduct systematic risk assessments (HIRARC)?
questions.detail: Employers must identify hazards, assess risks, and implement controls for all work activities.
action_steps: Establish a HIRARC procedure for all tasks and areas
Train responsible person to conduct risk assessments
Document all assessments and control measures
Review assessments when processes change or after incidents

questions.question: Do you have emergency response procedures?
questions.detail: Employers must establish procedures for fire, chemical spill, first aid, and evacuation.
action_steps: Develop emergency response plans for fire, spill, and evacuation
Install fire extinguishers and alarm systems
Conduct emergency drills at least once a year
Appoint and train emergency response team members

questions.question: Do you report accidents and dangerous occurrences?
questions.detail: All workplace accidents, dangerous occurrences, and occupational poisonings must be reported to DOSH.
action_steps: Establish an accident reporting procedure
Notify DOSH within 24 hours for serious accidents
Submit written report within 7 days (JKKP 6/7/8)
Maintain an accident register for all incidents

questions.question: Have you appointed a Safety and Health Officer (SHO)?
questions.detail: Required for manufacturing (500+ workers), construction (20+), shipbuilding (100+), utilities (500+).
action_steps: Determine if your industry and headcount require a SHO
Engage a DOSH-registered SHO
Register the SHO appointment with DOSH
Ensure SHO conducts regular inspections and maintains records

questions.question: Do you have a Safety and Health Committee?
questions.detail: Mandatory for workplaces with 40 or more employees.
action_steps: Establish a joint Safety and Health Committee
Include employer and employee representatives
Hold meetings at least once every 3 months
Maintain minutes and track action items

questions.question: Do you provide PPE to workers free of charge?
questions.detail: Employers must provide suitable PPE where hazards cannot be fully controlled by engineering means.
action_steps: Conduct PPE needs assessment for each task
Procure DOSH-approved PPE
Provide PPE free of charge to all workers
Train workers on correct use, fitting, and maintenance

questions.question: Do you conduct regular workplace inspections?
questions.detail: Regular inspections help identify unsafe conditions and ensure control measures remain effective.
action_steps: Schedule regular workplace inspections (monthly recommended)
Use a standardized inspection checklist
Document findings and assign corrective actions
Track closure of all identified issues

questions.question: Do workers receive safety information and training?
questions.detail: Employers must provide information, instruction, training, and supervision to ensure worker safety.
action_steps: Develop a safety training program for all workers
Conduct induction training for new employees
Provide job-specific safety training
Document all training attendance

regulations.title: Pekerja Gig 2025 (Akta 872)
regulations.full_title: Gig Worker Act 2025 — Regulates platform work, gig economy, and delivery services

questions.question: Do you have written service agreements with gig workers?
questions.detail: Every platform must have a written service agreement with each gig worker specifying terms and conditions.
action_steps: Draft a standard service agreement compliant with Akta 872
Specify scope of services, payment terms, and working conditions
Provide agreement in Bahasa Malaysia and English
Keep signed copies on record

questions.question: Are gig workers informed of income rates and payment methods?
questions.detail: Platforms must disclose pay rates, tip policies, and payment schedules clearly to all gig workers.
action_steps: Display pay rates and calculation methods clearly on the platform
Provide itemized income statements to each worker
Process payments within agreed timelines
Clearly communicate any changes to pay rates in advance

questions.question: Do you have a non-discrimination policy for gig workers?
questions.detail: Platforms must not discriminate against gig workers in assigning tasks, pay, or termination decisions.
action_steps: Adopt a written non-discrimination policy for gig workers
Ensure algorithm-based decisions are reviewed for bias
Provide a channel for workers to report discrimination
Take corrective action against any discriminatory practices

questions.question: Do you have an internal dispute resolution mechanism?
questions.detail: Platforms must provide a mechanism for gig workers to appeal deactivation, pay disputes, or grievances.
action_steps: Establish an internal dispute resolution process
Assign a dedicated team to handle gig worker complaints
Respond to complaints within specified timelines
Maintain records of all disputes and resolutions

questions.question: Do you ensure gig worker safety and provide accident coverage?
questions.detail: Platforms must implement safety measures and ensure gig workers are covered for work-related accidents.
action_steps: Develop safety guidelines for gig workers
Provide safety equipment where necessary (helmets, vests)
Ensure SOCSO or equivalent accident coverage is in place
Report any workplace accidents involving gig workers

regulations.title: Petroleum 1984 (Akta 302)
regulations.full_title: Petroleum (Safety Measures) Act 1984 — Regulates storage, transport, and handling of petroleum

questions.question: Do you have a valid storage license for petroleum?
questions.detail: Any premises storing petroleum in quantities exceeding exempted limits must have a storage license.
action_steps: Apply for a petroleum storage license from DOSH
Ensure storage facility meets construction and safety requirements
Display the license prominently at the storage premises
Renew the license before expiry

questions.question: Are petroleum storage areas properly constructed and maintained?
questions.detail: Storage tanks, bund walls, ventilation, and fire protection must comply with prescribed standards.
action_steps: Ensure storage tanks are of approved construction and materials
Install bund walls to contain spills
Provide adequate ventilation in storage areas
Conduct regular inspections of storage infrastructure

questions.question: Do you have fire prevention and firefighting equipment?
questions.detail: Fire extinguishers, fire suppression systems, and emergency plans are mandatory at petroleum premises.
action_steps: Install fire extinguishers suitable for Class B fires
Install fixed fire suppression systems where required
Develop a fire emergency response plan
Conduct regular fire drills and equipment inspections

questions.question: Do you have proper licenses for petroleum transport?
questions.detail: Vehicles transporting petroleum must be licensed and comply with safety requirements.
action_steps: Ensure all transport vehicles have required permits
Equip vehicles with fire extinguishers and spill kits
Train drivers on safe transport procedures
Maintain transport logs and inspection records

questions.question: Are warning signs displayed at petroleum facilities?
questions.detail: No-smoking signs, danger signs, and emergency contact information must be visibly posted.
action_steps: Install 'NO SMOKING' signs at all petroleum areas
Display danger warning signs at entry points
Post emergency contact numbers and procedures
Replace faded or damaged signs promptly

questions.question: Do you report petroleum-related accidents and incidents?
questions.detail: Any accident involving petroleum must be reported to an Inspector and investigated.
action_steps: Establish an incident reporting procedure
Notify the Petroleum Inspector immediately of any accident
Preserve the accident site for investigation
Cooperate fully with Inspector during investigation
